components.name: Express REST API Backend
components.description: Node.js/Express server handling all REST/API endpoints at /rest/* and /api/*, JWT authentication, file serving, middleware chain, and business logic orchestration. Central component with 50+ route handlers and intentionally vulnerable SQL and code execution paths.

components.name: Angular Single-Page Application
components.description: Angular 20 SPA compiled to static assets and served by the backend. Implements client-side route guards (LoginGuard, AdminGuard, AccountingGuard), stores JWT in localStorage, and uses bypassSecurityTrustHtml() in multiple components.

components.name: Data Layer (SQLite + MarsDB)
components.description: Dual-database persistence: SQLite via Sequelize ORM for relational data (users, products, orders, etc.) and MarsDB (MongoDB-like) for product reviews and order history. Multiple routes use raw SQL string interpolation enabling injection attacks.

components.name: File Upload Service
components.description: Handles multipart file uploads (ZIP, XML, YAML, images) via multer. ZIP handler has directory traversal. XML handler uses libxmljs2 with noent:true enabling XXE. Profile image upload accepts URLs for SSRF. Exposed FTP directory at /ftp.

components.name: B2B Order API
components.description: Authenticated B2B endpoint at /b2b/v2 that evaluates user-supplied order data using notevil + vm.runInContext, enabling RCE via sandbox bypass. Also includes Web3 wallet, NFT minting, and contract exploit listener endpoints.
